ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bowlers" (
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowler */,
  "bowler_name" TEXT /* Full name of the bowler */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the bowler belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the bowler */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the bowler */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the bowler (e.g., fast bowler, spin bowler, all-rounder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowlers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the league (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "administrator" TEXT /* Name of the league administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded */,
  "wkts" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled */,
  "econ" REAL /* Economy rate */,
  "four_wkts" INTEGER /* Number of four-wicket hauls */,
  "five_wkts" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, team manager, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view_match_stats, edit_match_stats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "overs_per_innings" INTEGER /* Number of overs per innings in the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_format_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format statistic */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played in the format */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled in the format */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded in the format */,
  "wkts" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken in the format */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled in the format */,
  "econ" REAL /* Economy rate in the format */,
  "four_wkts" INTEGER /* Number of four-wicket hauls in the format */,
  "five_wkts" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls in the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_format_statistics_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_format_statistics_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES match_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_bowler_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played in the season */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled in the season */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded in the season */,
  "wkts" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken in the season */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled in the season */,
  "econ" REAL /* Economy rate in the season */,
  "four_wkts" INTEGER /* Number of four-wicket hauls in the season */,
  "five_wkts" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_bowler_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_bowler_statistics_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)
